---
title: "Modelling"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-10"
---

```{r}
# Libraries
library(rminer)
```

```{r}
# Get Data
baltimore_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/baltimore_uni.rds")
baltimore_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/baltimore_multi.rds")

lancaster_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/lancaster_uni.rds")
lancaster_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/lancaster_multi.rds")

philadelphia_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/philadelphia_uni.rds")
philadelphia_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/philadelphia_multi.rds")

richmond_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/richmond_uni.rds")
richmond_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/richmond_multi.rds")
```


```{r}

# ── Parâmetros globais ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
NPRED  <- 7          # horizonte: 1 semana
LAGS   <- c(1, 2, 7) # lags definidos pela análise ACF/PACF
# (podes testar também c(1,7) ou c(1:7) e comparar)

# ── Função auxiliar: forecast univariado para uma loja (Fase I) ─────────────
forecast_univariate_phaseI <- function(serie, loja_nome, lags = LAGS, npred = NPRED) {
  
  S      <- serie
  srange <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(S, probs=c(0.01, 0.99))))
  
  # Converter série em data.frame com lags (inputs) e y (target)
  D  <- CasesSeries(S, lags)
  N  <- nrow(D)
  TR <- 1:(N - npred)     # treino: tudo exceto últimos 7 dias
  TS <- (N - npred + 1):N # teste: última semana
  
  cat("\n======", loja_nome, "======\n")
  cat("Total exemplos D:", N, "| Treino:", length(TR), "| Teste:", length(TS), "\n")
  
  # Treinar modelos
  NN <- fit(y~., D[TR,], model = "mlpe",         search = "heuristic")
  RF <- fit(y~., D[TR,], model = "randomForest",  search = "heuristic")
  
  # Previsões multi-step (lforecast propaga previsões anteriores como inputs)
  START <- N - npred + 1
  PNN   <- lforecast(NN, D, start = START, horizon = npred)
  PRF   <- lforecast(RF, D, start = START, horizon = npred)
  
  # Baseline: Seasonal Naive (repete os últimos 7 valores conhecidos)
  # Os últimos 7 valores conhecidos são os que precedem o período de teste na série original
  PSN <- S[(length(S) - npred*2 + 1):(length(S) - npred)] # semana anterior

  
  Y <- D[TS,]$y # valores reais
  
  # Métricas
  metrics_fn <- function(label, Pred) {
    cat(label, "| MAE:", round(mmetric(Y, Pred, metric="MAE"), 2),
        "| NMAE:", round(mmetric(Y, Pred, metric="NMAE", val=srange), 1), "%",
        "| RMSE:", round(mmetric(Y, Pred, metric="RMSE"), 2),
        "| R2:", round(mmetric(Y, Pred, metric="R22"), 3), "\n")
  }
  
  metrics_fn("NN  ", PNN)
  metrics_fn("RF  ", PRF)
  metrics_fn("SN  ", PSN) # Seasonal Naive baseline
  
  # Melhoria vs Seasonal Naive (baseada em NMAE)
  nmae_nn <- mmetric(Y, PNN, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
  nmae_rf <- mmetric(Y, PRF, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
  nmae_sn <- mmetric(Y, PSN, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
  cat("Melhoria NN vs SN:", round((nmae_sn - nmae_nn) / nmae_sn * 100, 1), "%\n")
  cat("Melhoria RF vs SN:", round((nmae_sn - nmae_rf) / nmae_sn * 100, 1), "%\n")
  
  # Gráfico predicted vs real
  main_nn <- paste0(loja_nome, " NN (NMAE=", round(nmae_nn,1), "%, R²=", round(mmetric(Y,PNN,metric="R22"),2), ")")
  mgraph(Y, PNN, graph="REG", main=main_nn, Grid=10,
         col=c("black","blue"), lty=1,
         leg=list(pos="topright", leg=c("real","NN pred.")))
  
  return(list(Y=Y, PNN=PNN, PRF=PRF, PSN=PSN, srange=srange))
}

# ── Aplicar a cada loja ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
res_balt  <- forecast_univariate_phaseI(baltimore_uni$Num_Customers,    "Baltimore")
res_lanc  <- forecast_univariate_phaseI(lancaster_uni$Num_Customers,    "Lancaster")
res_phil  <- forecast_univariate_phaseI(philadelphia_uni$Num_Customers, "Philadelphia")
res_rich  <- forecast_univariate_phaseI(richmond_uni$Num_Customers,     "Richmond")
```


```{r}

NPRED <- 7
LAGS  <- c(1, 2, 7)
W_SEMANAS <- 25  # ajusta entre 20 e 30 conforme preferires

backtesting_univariate <- function(serie, loja_nome, lags=LAGS,
                                   npred=NPRED, w_semanas=W_SEMANAS, step=7) {
  S      <- serie
  srange <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(S, probs=c(0.01, 0.99))))
  D      <- CasesSeries(S, lags)
  L      <- nrow(D)

  W    <- w_semanas * 7
  runs <- floor((L - npred - W) / step)

  cat("Loja:", loja_nome, "| nrow(D):", L,
      "| W:", W, "dias (", w_semanas, "semanas) | runs:", runs, "\n")

  ev_nn <- numeric(runs)
  ev_rf <- numeric(runs)
  ev_sn <- numeric(runs)
  all_Y <- c(); all_PNN <- c(); all_PRF <- c()

  for (b in 1:runs) {

    H2   <- holdout(D$y, ratio=npred, mode="rolling",
                    iter=b, window=W, increment=step)
    M_nn <- fit(y~., D[H2$tr,], model="mlpe",         search="heuristic")
    M_rf <- fit(y~., D[H2$tr,], model="randomForest",  search="heuristic")
    P_nn <- lforecast(M_nn, D, start=(length(H2$tr)+1), horizon=npred)
    P_rf <- lforecast(M_rf, D, start=(length(H2$tr)+1), horizon=npred)

    # Seasonal Naive correto: 7 dias imediatamente antes do teste na série original
    inicio_teste_S <- H2$ts[1] + max(lags)
    P_sn <- S[(inicio_teste_S - npred):(inicio_teste_S - 1)]

    Y_real   <- D[H2$ts,]$y
    ev_nn[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_nn, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
    ev_rf[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_rf, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
    ev_sn[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_sn, metric="NMAE", val=srange)

    cat("Iter:", b,
        "| TR:", H2$tr[1], "->", tail(H2$tr,1),
        "| TS:", H2$ts[1], "->", tail(H2$ts,1),
        "| NMAE NN:", round(ev_nn[b],1),
        " RF:", round(ev_rf[b],1),
        " SN:", round(ev_sn[b],1), "\n")

    all_Y   <- c(all_Y,   Y_real)
    all_PNN <- c(all_PNN, P_nn)
    all_PRF <- c(all_PRF, P_rf)
  }

  cat("\n---", loja_nome, "---\n")
  cat("NN  mediana NMAE:", round(median(ev_nn), 2), "%\n")
  cat("RF  mediana NMAE:", round(median(ev_rf), 2), "%\n")
  cat("SN  mediana NMAE:", round(median(ev_sn), 2), "%\n")

  best_nmae <- min(median(ev_nn), median(ev_rf))
  cat("Melhor modelo:", ifelse(median(ev_nn) <= median(ev_rf), "NN", "RF"), "\n")
  cat("Melhoria vs Seasonal Naive:",
      round((median(ev_sn) - best_nmae) / median(ev_sn) * 100, 1), "%\n")

  plot(all_Y, type="l", col="black",
       main=paste0(loja_nome, " — Rolling Window (", runs, " iterações)"),
       ylab="Num_Customers", xlab="Observações de teste acumuladas")
  lines(all_PNN, col="blue", lty=2)
  lines(all_PRF, col="red",  lty=3)
  legend("topright", c("Real","NN","RF"),
         col=c("black","blue","red"), lty=c(1,2,3))

  return(list(ev_nn=ev_nn, ev_rf=ev_rf, ev_sn=ev_sn))
}
```

```{r}
bt_balt  <- backtesting_univariate(baltimore_uni$Num_Customers,    "Baltimore")
bt_lanc  <- backtesting_univariate(lancaster_uni$Num_Customers,    "Lancaster")
bt_phil  <- backtesting_univariate(philadelphia_uni$Num_Customers, "Philadelphia")
bt_rich  <- backtesting_univariate(richmond_uni$Num_Customers,     "Richmond")
```

```{r}
# Tabela resumo para o relatório
resultados <- data.frame(
  Loja      = c("Baltimore","Lancaster","Philadelphia","Richmond"),
  NN_NMAE   = c(median(bt_balt$ev_nn), median(bt_lanc$ev_nn),
                median(bt_phil$ev_nn), median(bt_rich$ev_nn)),
  RF_NMAE   = c(median(bt_balt$ev_rf), median(bt_lanc$ev_rf),
                median(bt_phil$ev_rf), median(bt_rich$ev_rf)),
  SN_NMAE   = c(median(bt_balt$ev_sn), median(bt_lanc$ev_sn),
                median(bt_phil$ev_sn), median(bt_rich$ev_sn))
)

resultados$Melhor  <- ifelse(resultados$NN_NMAE <= resultados$RF_NMAE, "NN", "RF")
resultados$Melhoria_pct <- round(
  (resultados$SN_NMAE - pmin(resultados$NN_NMAE, resultados$RF_NMAE)) /
   resultados$SN_NMAE * 100, 1)

print(resultados)
```


```{r}
plot_metricas <- function(bt_result, loja_nome) {
  runs  <- length(bt_result$ev_nn)
  iters <- 1:runs
  ylim_nmae <- range(c(bt_result$ev_nn, bt_result$ev_rf, bt_result$ev_sn))
  
  plot(iters, bt_result$ev_nn, type="b", col="blue", pch=19, lty=1,
       ylim=ylim_nmae,
       main=paste0(loja_nome, " — NMAE por iteração"),
       xlab="Iteração", ylab="NMAE (%)")
  lines(iters, bt_result$ev_rf, type="b", col="red",   pch=17, lty=2)
  lines(iters, bt_result$ev_sn, type="b", col="black", pch=15, lty=3)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_nn), col="blue",  lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_rf), col="red",   lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_sn), col="black", lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  legend("topright",
         c(paste0("NN (med=",  round(median(bt_result$ev_nn),1), "%)"),
           paste0("RF (med=",  round(median(bt_result$ev_rf),1), "%)"),
           paste0("SN (med=",  round(median(bt_result$ev_sn),1), "%)")),
         col=c("blue","red","black"), lty=c(1,2,3), pch=c(19,17,15))
}

plot_metricas(bt_balt,  "Baltimore")
plot_metricas(bt_lanc,  "Lancaster")
plot_metricas(bt_phil,  "Philadelphia")
plot_metricas(bt_rich,  "Richmond")
```


```{r}
# ── Previsão final dos próximos 7 dias ──────────────────────────────────────
previsao_final <- function(serie, loja_nome, lags=LAGS, npred=NPRED) {
  
  S <- serie
  D <- CasesSeries(S, lags)
  
  # Treinar com TODOS os dados disponíveis
  modelo_final <- fit(y~., D, model="randomForest", search="heuristic")
  # (substitui randomForest pelo melhor modelo identificado na Fase II)
  
  # Prever os próximos 7 dias (1-ahead a 7-ahead)
  START  <- nrow(D) + 1
  P_final <- lforecast(modelo_final, D, start=START, horizon=npred)
  
  cat("\n===", loja_nome, "— Previsão próximos 7 dias ===\n")
  for (i in 1:npred) {
    cat("Dia +", i, ":", round(P_final[i]), "clientes\n")
  }
  
  # Gráfico: últimas 4 semanas reais + previsão
  ultimos <- tail(S, 28)
  plot(1:28, ultimos, type="l", col="black",
       xlim=c(1, 28+npred),
       main=paste0(loja_nome, " — Últimas 4 semanas + Previsão"),
       ylab="Num_Customers", xlab="Dias")
  lines((28+1):(28+npred), P_final, type="b", col="blue", pch=19)
  legend("topleft", c("Real","Previsão"), col=c("black","blue"), lty=1)
  
  return(P_final)
}

# Aplicar a cada loja
prev_balt  <- previsao_final(baltimore_uni$Num_Customers,    "Baltimore")
prev_lanc  <- previsao_final(lancaster_uni$Num_Customers,    "Lancaster")
prev_phil  <- previsao_final(philadelphia_uni$Num_Customers, "Philadelphia")
prev_rich  <- previsao_final(richmond_uni$Num_Customers,     "Richmond")
```

```{r}
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FORECAST MULTIVARIADO
# Variáveis endógenas: Num_Customers + Sales_Lag1
# Método MLPE
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

library(vars)
library(forecast)
library(rminer)

# ── Funções do multi-utils.R embutidas ──────────────────────────────────────

conv_ts <- function(x, frequency=1, labels=NULL) {
  if (is.vector(x)) {
    x <- ts(as.matrix(cbind(x)), frequency=frequency)
    if (is.null(labels)) labels <- "x_1"
  } else if (is.data.frame(x) || is.matrix(x)) {
    if (is.null(labels) && !is.null(names(x))) labels <- names(x) else labels <- paste("x_", 1:ncol(x), sep="")
    if (is.data.frame(x)) x <- as.matrix(x)
    x <- ts(x, frequency=frequency)
  }
  attr(x, "dimnames")[[2]] <- labels
  return(x)
}

autoVAR <- function(mtr, lag.max=10, type="const", season=NULL, exogen=NULL) {
  if (!is.ts(mtr)) mtr <- conv_ts(mtr)
  if (!is.null(exogen)) {
    if (!is.ts(exogen)) exogen <- conv_ts(exogen)
    mvar <- VAR(mtr, type=type, season=season, exogen=exogen, lag.max=lag.max, ic="SC")
  } else {
    mvar <- VAR(mtr, type=type, season=season, lag.max=lag.max, ic="SC")
  }
  return(mvar)
}

forecastVAR <- function(model, h=10, exogen=NULL) {
  models <- length(model$varresult)
  res    <- vector("list", length=models)
  if (!is.null(exogen)) {
    if (!is.ts(exogen)) exogen <- conv_ts(exogen)
    # Atribuir ao ambiente global com nome fixo para o vars::predict o encontrar
    assign("exogen_dumvar", exogen, envir=.GlobalEnv)
    F1 <- predict(model, n.ahead=h, dumvar=get("exogen_dumvar", envir=.GlobalEnv))
    rm("exogen_dumvar", envir=.GlobalEnv)
  } else {
    F1 <- predict(model, n.ahead=h)
  }
  for (i in 1:models) res[[i]] <- as.numeric(F1$fcst[[i]][,1])
  return(res)
}

autoARIMAX <- function(mtr, frequency=1, exogen=NULL) {
  if (!is.ts(mtr)) mtr <- conv_ts(mtr)
  models <- ncol(mtr)
  nr     <- nrow(mtr)
  nmtr   <- attr(mtr, "dimnames")[[2]]
  res    <- vector("list", length=models)
  res2   <- vector("list", length=models)
  if (!is.null(exogen)) {
    if (!is.ts(exogen)) exogen <- conv_ts(exogen, frequency=frequency)
  }
  for (i in 1:models) {
    if (frequency > 1) s_tr <- ts(mtr[1:nr,i], frequency=frequency) else s_tr <- ts(mtr[1:nr,i])
    xreg <- ts(mtr[1:nr,-i], frequency=frequency)
    if (!is.null(exogen)) xreg <- cbind(xreg, exogen)
    attr(xreg, "dimnames")[[2]] <- c(nmtr[-i], attr(exogen, "dimnames")[[2]])
    res[[i]]  <- auto.arima(s_tr, xreg=xreg)
    res2[[i]] <- auto.arima(s_tr)
  }
  return(list(arimax=res, arima=res2, frequency2=frequency))
}

forecastARIMAX <- function(model, h=10, exogen=NULL) {
  models <- length(model$arimax)
  res    <- vector("list", length=models)
  xreg   <- matrix(ncol=models, nrow=h)
  for (i in 1:models) xreg[,i] <- forecast(model$arima[[i]], h=h)$mean
  if (!is.null(exogen)) {
    if (!is.ts(exogen)) exogen <- conv_ts(exogen, frequency=model$frequency2)
  }
  for (i in 1:models) {
    if (length(xreg[1,-i]) == 1) { xaux <- matrix(ncol=1, nrow=h); xaux[,1] <- xreg[,-i] }
    else xaux <- as.matrix(xreg[,-i])
    narimax <- names(model$arimax[[i]]$coef)
    xaux    <- ts(xaux, frequency=model$frequency2)
    if (!is.null(exogen)) xaux <- as.matrix(cbind(xaux, exogen))
    attr(xaux, "dimnames")[[2]] <- narimax[(length(narimax)-ncol(xaux)+1):length(narimax)]
    F1      <- forecast(model$arimax[[i]], h=h, xreg=xaux)
    res[[i]] <- as.numeric(F1$mean)
  }
  return(res)
}

vreverse <- function(x) x[length(x):1]

mfit <- function(mtr, model, VINP, exogen=NULL) {
  nmodels <- ncol(mtr)
  lagmax  <- 1
  for (i in 1:nmodels)
    for (j in 1:nmodels)
      lagmax <- max(lagmax, VINP[[i]][[j]])
  mdata <- vector("list", length=nmodels)
  for (i in 1:nmodels) mdata[[i]] <- CasesSeries(mtr[,i], 1:lagmax)
  if (!is.null(exogen)) {
    NR <- nrow(mtr)
    if (is.vector(exogen)) {
      if (NR == length(exogen)) exogen <- cbind(exogen[(lagmax+1):NR])
      else exogen <- cbind(exogen)
    } else if (NR == nrow(exogen)) exogen <- exogen[(lagmax+1):NR,]
    exogen <- as.data.frame(exogen)
  }
  mdata2 <- vector("list", length=nmodels)
  for (i in 1:nmodels) {
    for (j in 1:nmodels) {
      if (j == 1) {
        mnames <- names(mdata[[j]])
        inames <- paste("lag", VINP[[i]][[j]], sep="")
        I <- NULL
        for (k in inames) I <- c(I, which(mnames==k))
        I  <- sort(I)
        D  <- mdata[[j]][,I]
        if (is.vector(D)) D <- data.frame(cbind(D))
        NCD    <- ncol(D)
        dnames <- vreverse(inames)
        ini <- 1; end <- ini + length(dnames) - 1
        names(D)[ini:end] <- paste("x", j, dnames, sep="")
      } else {
        NCD    <- ncol(D)
        inames <- paste("lag", VINP[[i]][[j]], sep="")
        dnames <- vreverse(inames)
        D      <- cbind(D, mdata[[j]][,dnames])
        ini    <- NCD + 1; end <- ini + length(dnames) - 1
        names(D)[ini:end] <- paste("x", j, dnames, sep="")
      }
    }
    if (!is.null(exogen)) D <- cbind(D, exogen, y=mdata[[i]]$y)
    else D <- cbind(D, y=mdata[[i]]$y)
    mdata2[[i]] <- D
  }
  mmodels <- vector("list", length=nmodels)
  for (i in 1:nmodels) mmodels[[i]] <- fit(y~., mdata2[[i]], model=model)
  return(list(mdata=mdata2, mmodels=mmodels, vinp=VINP))
}

lforecastm <- function(model, h=10, exogen=NULL) {
  models <- length(model$mmodels)
  res    <- vector("list", length=models)
  for (j in 1:models) res[[j]] <- vector(length=h)
  if (!is.null(exogen) && is.vector(exogen)) exogen <- cbind(exogen)
  exogen <- as.data.frame(exogen)
  if (!is.null(exogen)) nexo <- names(exogen)
  VEX    <- vector("list", length=models)
  vnames <- vector("list", length=models)
  VI     <- vector("list", length=models)
  for (i in 1:h) {
    for (j in 1:models) {
      start    <- nrow(model$mdata[[j]]) - h + 1
      VEX[[j]] <- model$mdata[[j]][start+i-1,]
      if (i > 1) {
        for (k in 1:models) {
          VI[[k]]     <- intersect(1:(i-1), model$vinp[[j]][[k]])
          vnames[[k]] <- paste("x", k, "lag", VI[[k]], sep="")
          vnames[[k]] <- vreverse(vnames[[k]])
          VI[[k]]     <- as.numeric(VI[[k]])
          VEX[[j]][,vnames[[k]]] <- res[[k]][(i-1) - vreverse(VI[[k]]) + 1]
        }
      }
      if (!is.null(exogen)) { INP <- VEX[[j]]; INP[,nexo] <- exogen[i,] }
      else INP <- VEX[[j]]
      res[[j]][i] <- predict(model$mmodels[[j]], INP)
    }
  }
  return(res)
}
```

```{r}
# ── Parâmetros ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
NPRED     <- 7
W_SEMANAS <- 25
K         <- 7   # sazonalidade semanal

# VINP: lags para cada variável endógena
# Var 1 (Num_Customers): lags 1,2,7 de Num_Customers + lags 1,7 de Sales
# Var 2 (Sales):         lags 1,7 de Num_Customers   + lags 1,2,7 de Sales
VINP        <- vector("list", length=2)
VINP[[1]]   <- list(c(1,2,7), c(1,7))
VINP[[2]]   <- list(c(1,7),   c(1,2,7))

# ── Função auxiliar de gráfico e métricas para 2 variáveis ─────────────────
fshow_multi <- function(Y, Pred1, Pred2, method, loja_nome) {
  par(mfrow=c(1,2))
  srange1 <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(Y[,1], probs=c(0.01,0.99))))
  srange2 <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(Y[,2], probs=c(0.01,0.99))))
  nmae1   <- round(mmetric(Y[,1], Pred1, metric="NMAE", val=srange1), 1)
  nmae2   <- round(mmetric(Y[,2], Pred2, metric="NMAE", val=srange2), 1)
  mgraph(Y[,1], Pred1, graph="REG", Grid=10,
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " ", method, " Num_Customers (NMAE=", nmae1, "%)"),
         col=c("black","blue"), leg=list(pos="topleft", leg=c("real",method)))
  mgraph(Y[,2], Pred2, graph="REG", Grid=10,
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " ", method, " Sales (NMAE=", nmae2, "%)"),
         col=c("black","red"),  leg=list(pos="topleft", leg=c("real",method)))
  par(mfrow=c(1,1))
  cat(method, loja_nome,
      "| Num_Customers NMAE:", nmae1, "%",
      "| Sales NMAE:", nmae2, "%\n")
}

# ── Preparar matriz endógena a partir do dataframe multi ───────────────────
prepare_endogenous <- function(df_multi) {
  # Endógenas: Num_Customers e Sales_Lag1 (proxy de Sales sem data leakage)
  mtr_end <- cbind(
    Num_Customers = df_multi$Num_Customers,
    Sales         = df_multi$Sales_Lag1
  )
  # Remover linhas com NA (primeiros registos por causa dos lags)
  mtr_end <- mtr_end[complete.cases(mtr_end), ]
  return(mtr_end)
}

# ── Preparar variáveis exógenas ─────────────────────────────────────────────
prepare_exogenous <- function(df_multi, n_rows) {
  exo_cols <- intersect(colnames(df_multi),
                        c("TouristEvent_num","IsHoliday",
                          "IsBlackFriday","IsChristmas","Pct_On_Sale"))
  if (length(exo_cols) == 0) return(NULL)
  exogen <- as.matrix(df_multi[1:n_rows, exo_cols])
  return(exogen)
}
```


```{r}
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FASE I — Multivariado
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
forecast_multi_phaseI <- function(df_multi, loja_nome, npred=NPRED) {
  mtr_end <- prepare_endogenous(df_multi)
  N       <- nrow(mtr_end)
  exogen  <- prepare_exogenous(df_multi, N)
  hd   <- holdout(mtr_end[,1], ratio=npred, mode="order")
  Y    <- mtr_end[hd$ts,]
  mtr_tr  <- ts(mtr_end[hd$tr,], frequency=K)
  exotr   <- if (!is.null(exogen)) exogen[hd$tr,,drop=FALSE] else NULL
  exots   <- if (!is.null(exogen)) exogen[hd$ts,,drop=FALSE] else NULL

  cat("\n======", loja_nome, "(Multivariado Fase I) ======\n")
  cat("N:", N, "| Treino:", length(hd$tr), "| Teste:", npred, "\n")

  # ── VAR ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  cat(">> VAR\n")
  mvar <- suppressWarnings(autoVAR(mtr_tr))
  FV   <- forecastVAR(mvar, h=npred)
  fshow_multi(Y, FV[[1]], FV[[2]], "VAR", loja_nome)

  # ── ARIMAX com fallback para ARIMA puro se falhar ─────────────────────────
  cat(">> ARIMAX\n")
  arimax_result <- tryCatch({
    arimax <- suppressWarnings(autoARIMAX(mtr_tr, frequency=K, exogen=exotr))
    suppressWarnings(forecastARIMAX(arimax, h=npred, exogen=exots))
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  [ARIMAX falhou — usando ARIMA puro]\n")
    res <- vector("list", length=2)
    for (i in 1:2) {
      s_tr    <- ts(mtr_tr[,i], frequency=K)
      m       <- suppressWarnings(auto.arima(s_tr))
      res[[i]] <- as.numeric(forecast(m, h=npred)$mean)
    }
    res
  })
  fshow_multi(Y, arimax_result[[1]], arimax_result[[2]], "ARIMAX", loja_nome)

  # ── Multivariate MLPE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  cat(">> Multivariate MLPE\n")
  MNN  <- mfit(mtr_end[hd$tr,], "mlpe", VINP, exogen=exotr)
  Pred <- lforecastm(MNN, h=npred, exogen=exots)
  fshow_multi(Y, Pred[[1]], Pred[[2]], "MLPE", loja_nome)

  return(list(Y=Y, VAR=FV, ARIMAX=arimax_result, MLPE=Pred))
}

res_multi_balt <- forecast_multi_phaseI(baltimore_multi,    "Baltimore")
res_multi_lanc <- forecast_multi_phaseI(lancaster_multi,    "Lancaster")
res_multi_phil <- forecast_multi_phaseI(philadelphia_multi, "Philadelphia")
res_multi_rich <- forecast_multi_phaseI(richmond_multi,     "Richmond")
```

```{r}
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FASE II — Backtesting Rolling Window Multivariado
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
backtesting_multi <- function(df_multi, loja_nome,
                              npred=NPRED, w_semanas=W_SEMANAS, step=7) {

  mtr_end  <- prepare_endogenous(df_multi)
  N        <- nrow(mtr_end)
  exogen   <- prepare_exogenous(df_multi, N)
  srange_c <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(mtr_end[,1], probs=c(0.01,0.99))))

  W    <- w_semanas * 7
  runs <- floor((N - npred - W) / step)

  cat("Loja:", loja_nome, "| N:", N,
      "| W:", W, "dias (", w_semanas, "sem.) | runs:", runs, "\n")

  ev_var    <- numeric(runs)
  ev_arimax <- numeric(runs)
  ev_mlpe   <- numeric(runs)
  ev_sn     <- numeric(runs)
  all_Y <- c(); all_VAR <- c(); all_ARIMAX <- c(); all_MLPE <- c()

  for (b in 1:runs) {

  H2 <- holdout(mtr_end[,1], ratio=npred, mode="rolling",
                iter=b, window=W, increment=step)

  mtr_tr <- ts(mtr_end[H2$tr,], frequency=K)
  Y_real <- mtr_end[H2$ts, 1]

  exotr <- if (!is.null(exogen)) exogen[H2$tr,,drop=FALSE] else NULL
  exots <- if (!is.null(exogen)) exogen[H2$ts,,drop=FALSE] else NULL

  # VAR — sem exógenas
  mvar  <- suppressWarnings(autoVAR(mtr_tr))
  FV    <- forecastVAR(mvar, h=npred)
  P_var <- FV[[1]]

  # ARIMAX — com fallback para ARIMA puro se falhar
  arimax_result <- tryCatch({
    arimax <- suppressWarnings(autoARIMAX(mtr_tr, frequency=K, exogen=exotr))
    suppressWarnings(forecastARIMAX(arimax, h=npred, exogen=exots))
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  [ARIMAX falhou na iter", b, "— usando ARIMA puro]\n")
    res <- vector("list", length=2)
    for (i in 1:2) {
      s_tr <- ts(mtr_tr[,i], frequency=K)
      m    <- suppressWarnings(auto.arima(s_tr))
      res[[i]] <- as.numeric(forecast(m, h=npred)$mean)
    }
    res
  })
  P_arimax <- arimax_result[[1]]

  # MLPE multivariado
  MNN    <- mfit(mtr_end[H2$tr,], "mlpe", VINP, exogen=exotr)
  Pred   <- lforecastm(MNN, h=npred, exogen=exots)
  P_mlpe <- Pred[[1]]

  # Seasonal Naive
  P_sn <- mtr_end[(H2$ts[1] - npred):(H2$ts[1] - 1), 1]

  ev_var[b]    <- mmetric(Y_real, P_var,    metric="NMAE", val=srange_c)
  ev_arimax[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_arimax, metric="NMAE", val=srange_c)
  ev_mlpe[b]   <- mmetric(Y_real, P_mlpe,   metric="NMAE", val=srange_c)
  ev_sn[b]     <- mmetric(Y_real, P_sn,     metric="NMAE", val=srange_c)

  cat("Iter:", b,
      "| VAR:", round(ev_var[b],1),
      " ARIMAX:", round(ev_arimax[b],1),
      " MLPE:", round(ev_mlpe[b],1),
      " SN:", round(ev_sn[b],1), "\n")

  all_Y      <- c(all_Y,      Y_real)
  all_VAR    <- c(all_VAR,    P_var)
  all_ARIMAX <- c(all_ARIMAX, P_arimax)
  all_MLPE   <- c(all_MLPE,   P_mlpe)
}

  cat("\n---", loja_nome, "(Multivariado) ---\n")
  cat("VAR    mediana NMAE:", round(median(ev_var),    2), "%\n")
  cat("ARIMAX mediana NMAE:", round(median(ev_arimax), 2), "%\n")
  cat("MLPE   mediana NMAE:", round(median(ev_mlpe),   2), "%\n")
  cat("SN     mediana NMAE:", round(median(ev_sn),     2), "%\n")

  best_nmae <- min(median(ev_var), median(ev_arimax), median(ev_mlpe))
  best_name <- c("VAR","ARIMAX","MLPE")[which.min(c(median(ev_var),
                                                     median(ev_arimax),
                                                     median(ev_mlpe)))]
  cat("Melhor modelo:", best_name, "\n")
  cat("Melhoria vs SN:",
      round((median(ev_sn) - best_nmae) / median(ev_sn) * 100, 1), "%\n")

  # Gráfico agregado
  plot(all_Y, type="l", col="black",
       main=paste0(loja_nome, " Multi — Rolling Window (", runs, " iterações)"),
       ylab="Num_Customers", xlab="Observações de teste acumuladas")
  lines(all_VAR,    col="blue",  lty=2)
  lines(all_ARIMAX, col="green", lty=3)
  lines(all_MLPE,   col="red",   lty=4)
  legend("topright", c("Real","VAR","ARIMAX","MLPE"),
         col=c("black","blue","green","red"), lty=c(1,2,3,4))

  return(list(ev_var=ev_var, ev_arimax=ev_arimax,
              ev_mlpe=ev_mlpe, ev_sn=ev_sn))
}

bt_multi_balt <- backtesting_multi(baltimore_multi,    "Baltimore")
bt_multi_lanc <- backtesting_multi(lancaster_multi,    "Lancaster")
bt_multi_phil <- backtesting_multi(philadelphia_multi, "Philadelphia")
bt_multi_rich <- backtesting_multi(richmond_multi,     "Richmond")
```

```{r}
# ── Gráfico de métricas por iteração ───────────────────────────────────────
plot_metricas_multi <- function(bt_result, loja_nome) {
  runs  <- length(bt_result$ev_var)
  iters <- 1:runs
  ylim  <- range(c(bt_result$ev_var, bt_result$ev_arimax,
                   bt_result$ev_mlpe, bt_result$ev_sn))
  plot(iters, bt_result$ev_var, type="b", col="blue",  pch=19, lty=1,
       ylim=ylim,
       main=paste0(loja_nome, " Multi — NMAE por iteração"),
       xlab="Iteração", ylab="NMAE (%)")
  lines(iters, bt_result$ev_arimax, type="b", col="green", pch=17, lty=2)
  lines(iters, bt_result$ev_mlpe,   type="b", col="red",   pch=15, lty=3)
  lines(iters, bt_result$ev_sn,     type="b", col="black", pch=18, lty=4)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_var),    col="blue",  lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_arimax), col="green", lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_mlpe),   col="red",   lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_sn),     col="black", lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  legend("topright",
         c(paste0("VAR (med=",    round(median(bt_result$ev_var),1),    "%)"),
           paste0("ARIMAX (med=", round(median(bt_result$ev_arimax),1), "%)"),
           paste0("MLPE (med=",   round(median(bt_result$ev_mlpe),1),   "%)"),
           paste0("SN (med=",     round(median(bt_result$ev_sn),1),     "%)")),
         col=c("blue","green","red","black"), lty=c(1,2,3,4), pch=c(19,17,15,18))
}

plot_metricas_multi(bt_multi_balt,  "Baltimore")
plot_metricas_multi(bt_multi_lanc,  "Lancaster")
plot_metricas_multi(bt_multi_phil,  "Philadelphia")
plot_metricas_multi(bt_multi_rich,  "Richmond")
```

```{r}
# ── Tabela resumo multivariado ──────────────────────────────────────────────
resultados_multi <- data.frame(
  Loja        = c("Baltimore","Lancaster","Philadelphia","Richmond"),
  VAR_NMAE    = c(median(bt_multi_balt$ev_var),    median(bt_multi_lanc$ev_var),
                  median(bt_multi_phil$ev_var),    median(bt_multi_rich$ev_var)),
  ARIMAX_NMAE = c(median(bt_multi_balt$ev_arimax), median(bt_multi_lanc$ev_arimax),
                  median(bt_multi_phil$ev_arimax), median(bt_multi_rich$ev_arimax)),
  MLPE_NMAE   = c(median(bt_multi_balt$ev_mlpe),   median(bt_multi_lanc$ev_mlpe),
                  median(bt_multi_phil$ev_mlpe),   median(bt_multi_rich$ev_mlpe)),
  SN_NMAE     = c(median(bt_multi_balt$ev_sn),     median(bt_multi_lanc$ev_sn),
                  median(bt_multi_phil$ev_sn),     median(bt_multi_rich$ev_sn))
)

resultados_multi$Melhor <- apply(resultados_multi[,2:4], 1,
                                  function(x) c("VAR","ARIMAX","MLPE")[which.min(x)])
resultados_multi$Melhoria_pct <- round(
  (resultados_multi$SN_NMAE - apply(resultados_multi[,2:4], 1, min)) /
   resultados_multi$SN_NMAE * 100, 1)

print(resultados_multi)
```
